message:
Add comprehensive errdefer cleanup to parser expressions and statements

- Add errdefer to all arithmetic expression parsers (parseBitOr, parseBitXor,
  parseBitAnd, parseShift, parseAddSub, parseMulDiv, parsePower)
- Add errdefer to logical expression parsers (parseOrExpr, parseAndExpr,
  parseNotExpr, parseComparison)
- Add errdefer to parseConditionalExpr and parseLambda
- Fix parseCall to properly clean up args, keyword_args, and func on error
- Add errdefer to parseDoubleStarArg, parseStarArg, parsePositionalOrKeywordArg
- Add errdefer to statement parsers: parseReturn, parseAssert, parseRaise,
  parseDel, parseWith
- Add errdefer to parseExprOrAssign for all assignment variants (annotated,
  tuple unpacking, augmented, regular)
- Fix parseTypeAnnotation to handle union types after generic brackets
  (e.g., Callable[[Any], T] | None)
- Fix parseTypeAnnotation to handle None/True/False as valid type names

This ensures proper memory cleanup when parsing fails partway through
complex expressions or statements.
